description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, paved driveway, and several large, leafy trees, which provide shade and enhance curb appeal. The front facade features large rectangular windows and a recessed entryway, while the side and rear elevations have fewer windows and more solid wall surfaces. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and there is a detached garage or carport on one side. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or concrete, with some glass elements for the windows. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open green space, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard with trees and a driveway. The design is minimalist, with light exterior finishes and a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, green lawn, and trees flanking the entry path.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back lawn, fewer windows, and the detached garage structure on the left.
description_view_2: Side view with visible windows, the garage structure, and the fenced boundary along the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the paved driveway, side lawn, and additional trees near the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and scattered side windows
